title: Wire Bureau review and Leitstand display boundary
goal: Only after the real-outcome usefulness gate succeeds, register how useful Heimlern proposals move into Bureau review status and an optional Leitstand read-only display without making either surface the source of outcome truth.

acceptance.assertion: T005 records a positive, evidence-bound operator-value evaluation before this task can become ready; insufficient or misleading output leaves this task unpromoted.
Bureau records proposal review state and follow-up decisions without storing raw Chronik outcome history.
Leitstand projection, if added, is read-only and displays source digest, freshness and proposal-only boundary language.
The design preserves Chronik history authority, Bureau task truth, Heimlern proposal-only role and Grabowski execution authority.

metadata.source_decision: Chronik selected as primary integration organ for Heimlern because it owns append-only historical outcomes.
metadata.demotion_basis: A review or display product is premature until real Grabowski outcomes show that Heimlern materially improves an operator diagnosis or decision.

bureau_always_open_scope_migration_20260.reason: Keep Bureau intake and unrelated registry writes available while this task is worked in an isolated branch.
